purpose: Long-weekend / civic / travel / local-planning stress case used to validate temporal boosts and practical weekly-plan utility.
why_this_third: It should follow S1 baseline and S2 anti-distortion setup so temporal tuning is judged in full context.
It is the practical relevance sample for alerts, civic items, local utility, shopping, and airlines.
It verifies that weekend and locality boosts improve usefulness without degrading serious sections or planner precision.

core: Local, Chennai, Trichy, and civic-relevant stories should improve in usefulness without overwhelming unrelated sections.
Weekend and entertainment boosts should make the feed feel timely, but should not degrade serious-section recall excessively.
Travel, event, and alert relevance should improve where appropriate.
Temporal boosts should help local and practical stories, not indiscriminately inflate low-signal content.
anti_patterns: Weekend boosts causing entertainment or social stories to dominate serious sections without gold support.
Weak local filler outranking more important world, india, business, or technology stories inappropriately.
Generic travel or shopping chatter surfacing without clear actionability or local value.
Duplicate or near-duplicate local items consuming too many top positions.

core: Alerts, civic items, events, shopping, airlines, and weather_alerts should have strong practical planning value.
Weekly plan should reflect same-day and next-day usefulness clearly.
Date extraction and day assignment should be reliable enough for real planning.
Long-weekend planner output should favor utility over content volume.
anti_patterns: Weakly actionable shopping or airline content crowding out better alerts, civic, or event items.
Old notices or stale advisories leaking into weekly plan.
Weather alerts included without timely relevance.
Weekly plan overloaded with repetitive leisure items while practical items are missed.

hard_rejection_conditions: Weekend or entertainment boosts materially reduce serious-section usefulness without corresponding local/planner benefit.
Weak local filler occupies top positions at the expense of stronger, more relevant stories without gold support.
Shopping, airline, or travel chatter leaks into planner output without real actionability.
Stale alerts or mistimed weather items leak into weekly plan.
Practical utility does not improve despite heavier temporal/local weighting.
execution_order: Draft gold labels for each news section with explicit local-utility and anti-filler constraints.
Draft gold labels for each Up Ahead category with practical-utility emphasis.
Run the app logic on the frozen inputs.
Reject any candidate config that boosts weekend/local content without practical utility gains.
Recommend no more than 5 bounded config changes.
suite_completion_note: S1_NEUTRAL, S2_FESTIVAL_STRESS, and S3_LONG_WEEKEND together form the full three-sample strict benchmark set.
